purpose: Report-only guardrail policy for determining whether a future WellFit pull request would be eligible for automatic merge consideration. This policy never authorizes or performs a merge by itself.

pr_creation_allowed.scope: Agent may create a PR for in-scope docs/register/governance changes after required local evidence is recorded, but may not merge, approve, self-approve, deploy, or claim merge readiness from PR creation alone.

merge_recommendation_allowed.scope: Agent may recommend merge only when all required local checks and GitHub checks are green, the branch is mergeable and up to date, branch protection and review rules are satisfied, human approval evidence is present, and protected-scope gates are clear.

auto_merge_allowed.disabledUntil: Required GitHub checks, branch protection, review rules, and human approval are machine-readably proven for the concrete PR and a separate human-approved policy update enables auto-merge.

requiredMachineReadableAutoMergeEvidence: required GitHub check names and conclusions are available and success
branch protection requirements are available and satisfied
review rules, required approvals, and review decision are available and satisfied
human approval for auto-merge is recorded in machine-readable form
PR mergeability is clean and base branch is protected as expected
no forbidden paths, forbidden topics, protected/runtime scope, Unity/PR #13 scope, or deployment changes are present
stateTransitionRules: The first meaningful next step is pr_creation_allowed, not auto_merge_allowed.
pr_creation_allowed permits PR creation but never merge, approval, self-approval, deployment, or auto-merge enablement.
merge_recommendation_allowed permits only a recommendation after all required local checks and GitHub checks are green and review/branch-protection/human-approval evidence is present.
auto_merge_allowed remains false until machine-readable GitHub checks, branch protection, review rules, and human approval are proven and separately human-approved.
humanApprovalAlwaysRequiredFor: any package.json or package-lock.json change without explicit approval
any app, component, lib, function, Firestore rules, or Unity/WellFitBuddyAR change
token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward authority, mission completion authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity, or PR #13 topics
failed, missing, skipped, or unknown required checks
more changed files, additions, or deletions than the configured maximum
